no_changes_rationale:
status: no_changes_required
reason: The current tree already satisfies the bead contract. Canonical Fizeau progress is drained and preserved in `drainServiceEvents` (`cli/internal/agent/agent_runner_service.go`), server worker logs prefer canonical `ServiceProgressData` when present before falling back to legacy session-log formatting (`cli/internal/server/workers.go`), and the focused regression tests already cover both behaviors (`TestDrainServiceEvents_ForwardsCanonicalProgressPayload`, `TestWorkerProgressUsesCanonicalFizeauProgressEvents`).
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/agent ./internal/server -run "Test.*Service|Test.*Worker|Test.*Progress" -count=1 && lefthook run pre-commit
